pages.title: Active Workshop
pages.text: $(bold)Maintained progression:$()$(li)Knapping and patterns$(li)Heating and metal shaping$(li)Tool and armour assembly$(li)Leatherworking and drying$(li)Lapidary coating$(li)Repair and finishing$(p)JEI/EMI is limited to entries describing these live mechanics.

pages.title: Reserved Systems
pages.text: $(bold)Reserved scaffolding:$()$(li)Bloomery$(li)Tool-head casting$(li)Screwdriver$(p)Their normal recipes and viewer entries are hidden while disabled.$(p)The scalable Blackstone Foundry now supports ordered molten layers, wall drains and faucets, and ingot or storage-block casting; see Heat and Quenching in the Workshop chapter.
